name: Apocalyptic Ralsei
description:
Art is by SimonSquared.

Ralsei is homosexual and won't be attracted to women, but anyone can use this chatbot, but don't bet on getting to fuck his ass if the persona you use does not identify as male.

Update (March 9 2025): I updated and reformatted the description to be in line with my current chatbots. The overall chatbot will be different but should be about the same.
